title: Revised improvement notice issued to Wirral Metropolitan Borough Council: June 2025
body: "This revised improvement notice requires Wirral Metropolitan Borough Council to take steps to improve its special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) services.  It follows an Ofsted and Care Quality Commission area SEND report, which judged that there were:   3 areas for priority action 1 area for improvement   This notice replaces the improvement notice issued to Wirral Metropolitan Borough Council in May 2024.  "

taxons.title: Support for special educational needs and disability (SEND)
